hero.lede: Slow, deliberate skincare sourced from the finest Korean houses. Formulated for sensitive skin, designed for daily ritual.

section.bestsellers_lede: Three quiet heroes, worn in the pockets of everyday skin.
section.ritual_lede: Four steps, morning and evening — sourced by us, chosen by you.
section.testimonials_lede: Letters from the people who quietly wear our rituals every day.
section.journal_lede: Notes on ingredients, seasons, and the Korean idea of a ritual.
section.newsletter_lede: New arrivals, ingredient deep-dives, and quiet thoughts. Unsubscribe any time.

product.reviews_none_body: Be the first to write about your experience.

shop.title: The collection
shop.lede: Considered objects, slow rituals. Every product here is sourced directly from the Korean houses we trust.
shop.empty: Nothing here — yet. Try another filter.

cart.shipping_note: Shipping and taxes calculated at checkout.
cart.empty_lede: Choose a cleanser, an essence, a balm — start the ritual.
cart.add_failed: Couldn't add to cart. Please try again.
cart.page_lede: Everything you've saved for this visit. Adjust quantities, remove pieces, or proceed when you're ready.

checkout.page_lede: A few details and you're done. We'll send a confirmation to your inbox the moment payment clears.
checkout.field_marketing: Send me occasional letters with new arrivals, rituals, and ingredient notes.
checkout.field_country_hint: Two-letter country code — BE, NL, FR, DE, LU.
checkout.field_billing_same: My billing address is the same as my shipping address.

checkout.summary_unshippable_hint: We don't ship to this country yet.
checkout.secured_by_mollie: Secured by Mollie · iDEAL · Bancontact · Cards · Apple Pay

error.VALIDATION_FAILED: Please check the fields above and try again.
error.CART_EMPTY: Your basket is empty. Add a product and try again.
error.NO_CART: We couldn't find your basket. Please add a product and try again.
error.COUNTRY_NOT_SHIPPABLE: We don't ship to this country yet.
error.CHECKOUT_UNAVAILABLE: Checkout isn't configured yet. Please try again shortly.
error.PAYMENT_PROVIDER_ERROR: We couldn't open the payment page. Please try again.
error.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again.

checkout.unavailable_lede: We're putting the finishing touches on secure payments. Your basket will stay saved — please return shortly.
checkout.success_title: Your order is on its way.
checkout.success_lede: We've sent a confirmation to {email}. You'll get a second note the moment your parcel ships.
checkout.success_pending_lede: This usually takes a few seconds. You can close this page — we'll email as soon as it's confirmed.
checkout.failure_lede: No charge was made. You can try again with the same or a different method — your basket is waiting.

concierge.title: Skin concierge
concierge.greeting: I'm here to help you choose. Ask me anything about ingredients, routines, or skin concerns.
concierge.placeholder: What would you like to know?
concierge.mode_quiz_hint: A few quick questions and we'll hand you a tailored 4-step ritual.
concierge.mode_chat_hint: Free-form conversation about ingredients, routines, or skin concerns.
concierge.quiz_error: We couldn't build your ritual right now. Please try again in a moment.
concierge.result_empty: We don't have enough matching products yet — browse the shop to explore the full catalogue.
concierge.chat_greeting: Hi — I'm your skin concierge. Ask me anything.
concierge.chat_error: Something went wrong. Try again or take the quiz for a quick routine.

skinType.question: How does your skin usually feel?

sensitivity.question: How often does your skin react to new products?

ritualDepth.question: How much time do you have each day?

options.complete: 10+ minutes — I love the full ritual

legal.fallback_notice: This page isn't translated yet — showing the English version.

consent.title: A considered use of cookies
consent.lede: We use cookies to keep your basket, remember your language, and — with your permission — to understand how the site is used.

necessary.label: Necessary
necessary.description: Required for the site to work — your basket, your language, security. Always on.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.description: Aggregated usage data so we can improve the site. Never linked to your identity.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: Personalised advertising on partner sites and measurement of our campaigns.

auth.sign_in_lede: Welcome back. Enter your email and password to continue.
auth.sign_in_generic_error: We couldn't sign you in with those details.
auth.sign_up_lede: Save your rituals, track orders, and keep your address book in one place.
auth.sign_up_check_inbox_body: We just sent a confirmation link to {email}. Tap it to finish setting up your account.
auth.sign_up_generic_error: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.
auth.sign_up_email_taken: An account already exists with this email. Try signing in instead.
auth.forgot_lede: Enter the email linked to your account and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgot_sent_body: If there's an account for {email}, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
auth.reset_lede: Your new password will replace the previous one the next time you sign in.
auth.reset_missing_session: This reset link has expired or has already been used. Request a new one to try again.
auth.field_marketing: Send me occasional letters with new arrivals, rituals, and ingredient notes. Unsubscribe any time.
auth.error_invalid: Please check the fields and try again.
auth.error_password_short: Your password must be at least 8 characters.

home.title: YU.R Skin Solution — Korean skincare, considered.
home.description: Curated Korean skincare from the finest houses. Formulated for sensitive skin, designed for daily ritual.

shop.title: Shop — YU.R Skin Solution
shop.description: Browse our edited selection of Korean skincare. Filter by skin type, concern, brand, or ingredient to find your ritual.

search.page_description: Find your next ritual — search across products, brands, and ingredients.
search.hint: Enter to see all results · ESC to close
search.no_results: Nothing matched. Try a brand, ingredient, or skin concern.
search.suggest_heading: Or start with a ritual step
search.suggest_lede: Every YU.R product fits into one of four slow, deliberate gestures.
search.ritual_cleanse_body: Low-pH milks and waters for the morning basin.
search.ritual_moisturise_body: Hydrating creams and balms for lasting comfort.
search.ritual_protect_body: Daily SPF and barrier care to seal the ritual.
search.empty_body: Find your next ritual — search by product, brand, or ingredient.
search.too_many_results: Showing the {shown} most relevant of {total}. Narrow with the filters to see the rest.
search.no_results_with_filters: Nothing matches “{q}” with the current filters. Try relaxing them.

journal.title: Notes, from the studio.
journal.lede: Ingredient studies, ritual notes, and quiet thoughts on Korean skincare. Written slowly, published when it feels finished.
journal.empty_title: The first letter is almost ready.
journal.empty_body: We're gathering the opening essays — one on ginseng, one on the Joseon moon jar, and a third on the first gesture of the morning. They'll appear here when they're ready to be read.
journal.meta_description: Ingredient studies, ritual notes, and quiet thoughts on Korean skincare.

contact.meta_description: Questions about your order, returns, wholesale or a product? Write to us — we read every message personally.
contact.title: Write to us.
contact.lede: Real people, one small studio. We read every message and usually reply within two working days.
contact.response_body: We aim to reply within two working days. For order questions, please include your order number (it starts with YUR-) so we can pull up your ritual straight away.
contact.message_placeholder: Tell us a little about what you're after — your skin story, a product question, anything at all.
contact.consent_label: I understand my message is stored so we can reply. Read the <link>privacy policy</link>.
contact.sent_body: We've got your note and will reply to {email} within two working days. Meanwhile, the shop is open.
contact.error_name_too_short: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters).
contact.error_name_too_long: That name is a bit too long — 80 characters max.
contact.error_email_invalid: That email doesn't look quite right. Please check it.
contact.error_phone_too_long: That phone number is too long.
contact.error_message_too_short: Please write a few more words (at least 10 characters) so we can help.
contact.error_message_too_long: That message is too long — 4 000 characters max.
contact.error_consent_required: Please tick the box to let us store your message.
contact.error_generic: Something didn't go through. Please check the highlighted fields.
